item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel raises flag on Beaufort Castle, expands Lebanon invasion across Litani River
item.description: Israeli forces captured the strategic Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon and issued evacuation orders for areas south of the Zahrani River, about 40km from the border. The IDF says it has crossed the Litani River as part of expanded operations against Hezbollah.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian drones strike key Russian Saratov oil refinery, pipeline facilities
item.description: Ukraines military confirmed strikes on the Saratov oil refinery (7M tons/year capacity), the Lazarevo pipeline station in Kirov Oblast 1,200km from Ukraine, and a fuel depot in Rostov Oblast. Russia reported intercepting 216 drones across 10 regions.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany delivers new IRIS-T air defense system to Ukraine amid Russian attack surge
item.description: President Zelensky announced Ukraine received a new IRIS-T system from Germany as Russian forces launched over 2,300 drones, 1,560 guided bombs, and 108 missiles in the past week. Ukraine faces critical shortages of air defense missiles.

item.title: 🇧🇾 Lukashenko warns Belarus has major target in Ukraine amid escalating tensions
item.description: Belarusian leader Alexander Lukashenko said Minsk has one major target with precise coordinates near Belarus, dismissing Ukrainian troops as cannon fodder. The remarks follow joint Belarusian-Russian nuclear drills and Kyivs identification of 500 potential targets in Belarus.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump claims Iran agreed not to develop nuclear weapons, sends revised deal proposal
item.description: President Trump said Iran has guaranteed it wont develop nuclear weapons, while reports indicate Washington sent Tehran a revised peace proposal with tougher terms. Iran maintains it requires release of $12 billion in frozen assets before substantive talks.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇪🇺 US Blasts European NATO Allies Over Defense Spending
item.description: The United States criticized NATO allies at a Singapore summit over inadequate defense contributions, while European officials insisted the alliance remains resilient amid growing transatlantic tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Partially Restores Internet After Three-Month Shutdown
item.description: Iranian authorities have reinstated limited internet access three months after cutting off the country at the start of the war with the US and Israel, though significant restrictions remain in place.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚖️ Trump Ukraine Aid Cuts Undermine Russian War Crimes Investigations
item.description: US aid reductions are hampering efforts to document and prosecute Russian war crimes in Ukraine, as investigators face challenges gathering evidence amid ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇮🇶 IRGC attacks separatist groups in northern Iraq amid regional tensions
item.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps ground forces struck bases of separatist groups in northern Iraq. The operation comes as Iran faces pressure from US negotiations and regional conflicts.

item.title: 🇲🇲💥 Myanmar explosion kills over 45 at mining explosives storage facility near China border
item.description: A deadly blast at a building storing explosives for mining in northeastern Myanmar killed more than 45 people and injured dozens. The explosion occurred in Namhkam township near the China border.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israeli forces capture strategic Beaufort Castle in deepest Lebanon incursion in 25 years
item.description: Israeli troops seized the Crusader-era castle overlooking southern Lebanon, marking a significant escalation despite a ceasefire agreement. Forces now occupy nearly one-fifth of Lebanese territory.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇨🇳 Japan rejects Chinese accusations of new militarism, cites Beijings rapid arms buildup
item.description: Tokyo pushed back against Chinese criticism of its defense policies, accusing China of being the true driver of military expansion in Asia-Pacific.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇵🇭 China patrols Scarborough Shoal after Philippines warns of maritime threat
item.description: Beijing deployed coast guard vessels to the disputed shoal in the South China Sea, escalating tensions with Manila over territorial claims.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Ukrainian drones strike pipeline, refinery and fuel depot across multiple Russian regions
item.description: Overnight drone attacks targeted energy infrastructure in several Russian regions, demonstrating Ukraines continued ability to project force deep into Russian territory.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump sends tougher terms to Iran for peace framework as negotiations continue
item.description: The US president revised the proposed deal text with stricter conditions, aiming to pressure Iran into accepting the current framework to end the war.

item.title: 🇨🇴 Colombia Votes in High-Stakes Presidential Election
item.description: Colombians cast ballots in a presidential election choosing between a leftist reformer, a security-focused businessman, and a right-wing senator. The outcome could reshape the country's approach to violence, inequality, and relations with the US.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Foreign Minister to Visit China and India for Strategic Talks
item.description: British Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper will travel to China on Monday and then to India, focusing on the Strait of Hormuz crisis, the Russia-Ukraine war, and the Ebola outbreak. The diplomatic mission comes as the UK seeks to maintain relations with key global powers amid shifting geopolitical dynamics.

item.title: 🇧🇷 Brazil Investigates Suspected Ebola Case in Sao Paulo
item.description: Health authorities in Brazil's Sao Paulo state are investigating a suspected Ebola case, raising concerns about potential spread of the outbreak from Africa to South America. The region remains on alert as the outbreak in Congo and Uganda continues.

item.title: 🤖 Pentagon Accelerates Push for Battlefield AI Amid Caution Calls
item.description: The Trump administration is pushing to integrate artificial intelligence into military operations, despite concerns from defense companies and military leaders about risks. The debate highlights tensions between rapid innovation and battlefield safety.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany Sends New IRIS-T System to Ukraine as Russian Attacks Intensify
item.description: Germany dispatched a new IRIS-T air defense system as Ukraine faces escalating Russian drone and missile attacks, with over 2,300 attack drones and 108 missiles launched in the past week alone.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Building Launch Pads Near Nuclear Missile Silos
item.description: Satellite imagery reveals China is constructing a sprawling network of military sites near its nuclear silos, including launch pads that could enhance the readiness of its nuclear forces capable of reaching US cities.

item.title: 🛰️ Pentagon Accelerates $4B SpaceX Deal for Global Aircraft Tracking From Orbit
item.description: A new $4 billion SpaceX contract aims to build a satellite network capable of tracking aircraft worldwide, potentially making traditional airborne early warning aircraft redundant.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Defence Minister Slams China's "Huge Arsenal" at Singapore Summit
item.description: Shinjiro Koizumi rebuffed Beijing's accusations of "new militarism," arguing China's nuclear arsenal and lack of transparency are the real threat to regional stability. The comments at the Shangri-La Dialogue mark Japan's most pointed response yet to Chinese criticism of its defence build-up.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Stops Another Merchant Ship in Iran Port Blockade
item.description: The US military fired a missile into the engine room of a Gambia-flagged cargo ship that ignored 20+ warnings trying to enter an Iranian port. Six ships have now been stopped under the blockade launched in response to Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇫🇷 France Arrests 780 After Champions League Final Riots
item.description: Nearly 800 people were arrested and 219 injured—including 57 police—after PSG's Champions League victory sparked violent clashes across France. One person was found dead near the Paris ring road.
